zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland於1364年6月1日出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯時，她的父親Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford29歲，母親Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP30歲。她於1382年與Ralph Neville在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1396年6月9日在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素享年32歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland于1364年6月1日出生在英国英格兰達勒姆布朗加斯时，她的父亲Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford29岁，母亲Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP30岁。她于1382年与Ralph Neville在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1396年6月9日在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素享年32岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland was born on 1 June 1364, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, was 29 and her mother, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, was 30. She married Ralph Neville in 1382, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 9 June 1396, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland est née le 1 juin 1364, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Neville en 1382, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 juin 1396, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland am 1. Juni 1364 in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford 29 und ihre Mutter Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP 30. Sie hat 1382 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England Ralph Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Juni 1396 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Raby Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland è nata il il 1 giugno 1364 nel Brancepeth, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Neville nel 1382, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 giugno 1396, nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmorelandが1364年6月1日にイギリスイギリスダルハムブランセペスで生まれた時，父Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Staffordは29歳，母Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMPは30歳であった。1382年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでRalph Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1396年6月9日にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで32歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland(이)가 1364년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1382년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 Ralph Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 6월 9일 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람에 묻혔다.

pt.1 June 1364–9 June 1396: 1 de junho de 1364–9 de junho de 1396
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland nasceu em 1 de junho de 1364, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Neville em 1382, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de junho de 1396, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland родилась 1 июня 1364 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Neville в 1382 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 9 июня 1396 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности дурам, Англия.

es.1 June 1364–9 June 1396: 1 de junio de 1364–9 de junio de 1396
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland nació el 1 de junio de 1364, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ralph Neville en 1382, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de junio de 1396, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Durham, Inglaterra.
